text.title: trello-kanban Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trello-kanban as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using 10+ lists to model every possible state.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Board becomes unreadable; WIP limits are meaningless across too many stages.

failure-mode.description: Creating labels per team member or per sprint.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Labels multiply unboundedly; use custom fields for sprint and assignee metadata instead.

failure-mode.description: Registering webhooks per card instead of per board.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Per-card webhooks must be re-registered whenever a card is copied or the board is recreated; board-level webhooks catch all card events in one stream.
